questionHtml: Determine the largest magnitude of F for which the block and the object do not move relative to each other.
markschemeHtml:
F = 60a ✓

Ff = 0.6 × 15 × 9.8 «= 88.2 N» ✓

88.2=15×F60⇒F=350 «N» ✓

 

Allow use of a = 0.6g leading to 353 N.

meta.title: Determine the largest magnitude of F for which the block and the object do not move relative to each other.
